algebra.title: Solve Equations
algebra.desc: Wolfram Alpha can solve linear, quadratic, polynomial and systems of equations symbolically or numerically.

algebra.title: Polynomial Operations
algebra.desc: Factor, expand, and simplify polynomial expressions.

algebra.title: Graphing Functions
algebra.desc: Visualize algebraic functions with interactive plots.

calculus.title: Integration
calculus.desc: Compute definite and indefinite integrals symbolically and numerically.

calculus.title: Derivatives
calculus.desc: Find derivatives of functions, including partial derivatives and higher-order derivatives.

calculus.title: Series & Limits
calculus.desc: Evaluate limits, Taylor series, Fourier series, and more.

statistics.title: Statistical Distributions
statistics.desc: Analyze probability distributions, compute moments and quantiles.

statistics.title: Data Analysis
statistics.desc: Compute descriptive statistics, regression, and correlation.

statistics.title: Probability
statistics.desc: Compute probabilities for events and distributions.

physics.title: Classical Mechanics
physics.desc: Compute forces, energy, momentum, and motion using fundamental physics formulas.

physics.title: Electromagnetic Theory
physics.desc: Solve problems involving electric and magnetic fields, circuits, and waves.

physics.title: Quantum & Atomic Physics
physics.desc: Explore photon energies, atomic spectra, and quantum phenomena.

chemistry.title: Chemical Elements
chemistry.desc: Access comprehensive data on all elements of the periodic table.

chemistry.title: Chemical Equations

chemistry.title: Molecular Properties

astronomy.title: Sky Charts
astronomy.desc: Generate star charts, planet positions, and astronomical event predictions.

weather.title: Current Conditions
weather.desc: Get real-time weather data for any location worldwide.

weather.desc: Access hourly and daily forecasts, and historical weather records.
